layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing for layout (p-8 to p-12) to feel editorial, but compact spacing inside tables (p-2 to p-3) for data density.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Use bento-style or cardless flat rectangles with sharp 1px borders, NO rounded corners (rounded-none).
layout_and_spacing.dropzone: Large central hero dropzone, bordered with a subtle dashed line, elevated on hover. 'Wow' moment provided through micro-interactions and sleek typography rather than generic illustration.

components.cards: border border-zinc-200 bg-white rounded-none shadow-none hover:border-zinc-400 transition-colors duration-200
components.tables: Dense. Use IBM Plex Sans or a clear tabular sans. Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 border-b-2 border-zinc-950. Rows: text-sm border-b border-zinc-100. Cell padding: py-2 px-3.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800. Secondary: border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-50.
components.status_indicators: Use the insurance_lines colors. Small colored dots or minimalist pill badges with sharp corners.

image_urls.description: Abstract architectural shapes with sky visible. Use with a white/grey overlay to maintain contrast.
Smiling man in white shirt for the logged-in user avatar.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Darken borders, slightly shift background colors. Explicitly define hover text colors.
motion_and_interactions.dropzone_interaction: On drag enter, background shifts to a subtle zinc-50, and the dashed border becomes solid zinc-900. Smooth 0.2s transition.
motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Avoid generic spinners. Use a sleek, thin progress bar at the top of the container or a typewriter-style status update ('Extracting plan design...', 'Analyzing rates...').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use generic Inter font for headings. Load and use 'Playfair Display' for an authoritative, editorial feel.
CRITICAL: The UI must be highly functional and data-dense. Use table layouts and grids efficiently.
Build a PIN login screen first, using the login_background image with a heavy white overlay (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md) so the form is readable.
The main dashboard should feature a prominent drag-and-drop zone at the top. The zone should look editorial, like a submission tray for documents.
Implement the 6 insurance lines as distinct sections or tabs. Use the color palette defined in 'insurance_lines' to subtly differentiate them.
Tables must be data-dense. Remove standard padding, use text-sm or text-xs where appropriate, and keep the UI monochrome except for status/category accents.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements like buttons, inputs, dropzones, and tabs.

Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the layout structure. You may use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, tabs, and tables. Ensure you override Shadcn defaults to remove rounded corners (rounded-none) to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
